Artificial Flowers & Botanical Design

Beauty that never fades

Daco crafts lifelike artificial flowers and botanical arrangements that bring enduring elegance to homes, events, and spaces — without compromise.

About Us

From a small florist established in 1986, Daco has come a long way to become one of the leading artificial flowers & plants provider in Singapore. We strive to bring you the widest range of christmas decorations, artificial flowers & plants, floral arrangements & vases.

Besides our core competencies in floral arrangements & landscaping, we also do custom orders for retail space projects. We would like to thank all our customers for your loyal support throughout these years.
